overview: SHUBH SCHOOL ERP is a comprehensive, modular school management system for Indian schools built on the Internet Computer. It supports multi-school/branch operations with all user roles (Super Admin, Admin, Teacher, Parent, Student, Driver). All data is stored natively in the Internet Computer canister for instant, reliable, cross-device sync — no PHP, MySQL, or cPanel required.
features: Student Information System with Excel-style grid and bulk import/export
Fees Collection with auto month selection, receipts, balance carry-forward
Attendance (QR, RFID, biometric, AI face recognition)
Chat system with class/section and route-wise groups
Multiple color themes with dark sidebar
Role-based permissions (Super Admin, Admin, Teacher, Parent, Student, Driver)
Canister-native storage — no MySQL or cPanel sync needed
